productDisplayName: Puma Men Excitmo I FG White Sports Shoe
description: What more do you need from your football shoes? This shoe from puma has it all – slick, simple design, unbelievably lightweight and built in studs for the best grip when playing on grass. White blue and black will coordinate with whatever colours you're wearing. And the shiny white surface will ensure that all eyes are fixed on your feet only. Upper Plastic coated synthetic fabric for water resistance Lace-ups for a snug Fit Padded collar for comfort puma cat logo on tongue and heel Midsole Lightly padded midsole for support Outsole Moulded plastic sole with studs for grip on grass pitches Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
